name: NPM Cache
description: Cached packages for Node Package Manager.
impact: Next npm install might take longer to download packages.

name: Rust Cargo Registry
description: Cached source code and index for Cargo packages.
impact: Cargo will re-download the index and crates on next build.

name: pnpm Store
impact: Next pnpm install will fetch packages from the network.

name: Yarn Cache
impact: Next yarn install will fetch packages from the network.

name: Pip Cache
impact: Pip will re-download packages instead of using the cache.

name: NuGet Packages
impact: Projects will need to restore packages on the next build, which can take time.

name: Gradle Caches
description: Cached dependencies and build outputs for Java/Android projects.
impact: Gradle will re-download dependencies on the next sync.

name: Java Maven Cache
description: Cached JARs and dependencies for Maven/Java projects.
impact: Maven will re-download required dependencies on the next project build.

name: Unity Engine Cache
description: Global package cache for the Unity Game Engine.
impact: Unity will re-download packages the next time you open a project.

name: General Developer Caches (.cache)
description: Generic .cache directory used by Python, AI models (HuggingFace), and linters.
impact: Tools will need to re-download cached models or datasets.

name: Docker Build Caches
description: Temporary builder files and cached layers in .docker.
impact: Next Docker builds may take longer without cache.

name: Rustup Downloads
description: Temporary files and incomplete downloads from Rustup.
